🧮 Food Cost & Margin Calculator
Calculate ideal selling price based on food cost and desired margin.
📐 Bulk Price Adjuster
Adjust prices for an entire vendor's menu by percentage or fixed amount.
🏁 Competitive Price Benchmarker
Compare your item prices against typical market ranges for Kerala food delivery.
📦 Packing Charge Optimizer
Set optimal packing charges that customers will accept without order abandonment.
✍️ AI Menu Description Generator
Generate mouth-watering descriptions for menu items that boost conversions.
💡 AI Menu Name Enhancer
Transform plain item names into catchy, search-optimized names that attract more orders.
🏥 AI Menu Health Check
Get AI-powered recommendations to improve your vendor's menu performance.
🔥 AI Trending Items Advisor
Get AI suggestions for trending menu items to add based on vendor type and location.
🎯 Smart Menu Optimizer
Select a vendor and get a complete AI-powered menu audit with actionable recommendations on pricing, gaps, category balance, and growth opportunities.
🎯
Select a vendor and run the optimizer to get personalized menu recommendations
🔢 Forward Calc
🔄 Reverse Calc
📦 RPO Calc
📊 More Tools
📥 Input
FIXED: GST = 18% on Commission · TDS = 0.1% of Price
⚡ PG = 1% (Current Rate)
TCS = Off (not applied)
📤 Calculation Breakdown
Enter values to calculate
📥 Reverse Input
REVERSE FORMULA:
Deduction = (Comm% × 1.18) + PG% + TDS% + TCS%
⚡ PG = 1% (Current Rate)
TCS = Off
📤 Required Listing Price
Enter values to calculate
📊 Bulk Commission Estimator
Estimate net payout across multiple price points at once
🎯 Break-Even Order Calculator
Find minimum orders needed to cover fixed monthly costs
📦 RPO — Rate Per Order Calculator
Formula: (Sales Revenue + Extra Value) ÷ Order Count
WHAT IS RPO?
Revenue earned per order on average.
Includes any extra value like surge or bonus payouts.
📊 RPO Breakdown
Enter values to calculate
🏪 Multi-Vendor RPO Comparison
Add multiple vendors to compare their RPO side by side

🔢 FSSAI License Number Validator

Validate FSSAI license number format (14-digit format check).

🏭
FSSAI License
Food Safety and Standards Authority of India. Required for all food businesses.
Food Businesses Mandatory
💼
GST Registration
Goods & Services Tax. Mandatory if turnover exceeds ₹40L (₹20L for services).
All Businesses Threshold Based
🪪
PAN Card
Permanent Account Number. Required for all financial transactions and tax filing.
Individual / Business Mandatory
🏪
Trade License
Local municipal body permission to conduct business from a premises.
Shop / Restaurant Mandatory
🏦
Bank Account Proof
Cancelled cheque or bank statement for payment settlement verification.
Payment Setup Required
📜
Shops & Establishment Act
State-level registration for shops, commercial establishments, and restaurants.
Kerala Specific Recommended

🔥 Firebase Realtime Database
⏳ Checking Firebase connection…
Firebase Configuration
Setup Guide
1. Go to console.firebase.google.com
2. Open project potafo-kam (or create new)
3. Go to Realtime Database → Rules
4. Paste these rules and click Publish:
{
  "rules": {
    ".read": true,
    ".write": true
  }
}
5. Go to Project Settings → General
6. Copy apiKey, projectId, appId, databaseURL
7. Paste them in the fields on the left → Save & Test
🔗 Open Firebase Rules
☁️ Supabase Cloud Setup

Connect your dashboard to a free Supabase database so all KAMs share the same live data across devices.

⚠️ Not connected — using local browser storage only
ℹ️ These credentials are saved in your browser. Each device needs to enter them once.
📋 Setup Guide
STEP-BY-STEP
1. Go to supabase.com → Sign up free
2. Create a new project (choose any region)
3. Go to SQL Editor → run the SQL below
4. Go to Settings → API → copy URL + anon key
5. Paste them above → click Connect
6. Share this HTML file with your team — they paste the same keys
SQL TO RUN IN SUPABASE
create table vendors ( id bigint primary key, name text not null, city text, stage text default 'Onboarding', notes text, created_at text ); create table menu_items ( id bigint primary key, vendor_id bigint references vendors(id) on delete set null, name text not null, rate numeric, from_time text, to_time text, type text default 'Menu', sub_category text, diet text, description text, status text default 'Y', portions text ); create table activities ( id bigint primary key, date text, vendor_id bigint references vendors(id) on delete set null, type text, kam_name text, remarks text ); create table documents ( id bigint primary key, vendor_id bigint references vendors(id) on delete set null, cert_type text, upload_date text, expiry_date text, notes text, file_name text, file_size bigint, file_mime text, status text ); -- Enable public read/write (for internal tool use) alter table vendors enable row level security; alter table menu_items enable row level security; alter table activities enable row level security; alter table documents enable row level security; create policy "allow all" on vendors for all using (true) with check (true); create policy "allow all" on menu_items for all using (true) with check (true); create policy "allow all" on activities for all using (true) with check (true); create policy "allow all" on documents for all using (true) with check (true);

📥 KAM Sheet Import

Upload your KAM master spreadsheet (CSV) to bulk-import vendors, leads, and activities into the dashboard.
Admin only. Existing records with the same name + hub will be skipped (no duplicates).

IMPORT OPTIONS — toggle what to import:
EXPECTED CSV FORMAT (first row = headers):
Vendors sheet: name, city, stage, hub, mobile, notes
Leads sheet: name, contact, mobile, hub, cuisine, stage, followup, notes
Activities sheet: date, vendor_name, type, kam_name, remarks
📊
Drop your KAM CSV here
or click to browse · CSV files only
🔗 Bulk Drive Link Paste
📋 How to use: Paste one entry per line in the format:
Vendor Name | https://drive.google.com/...
Vendor name is matched by exact or closest match. Existing links are overwritten.
📊 Current Drive Link Status
⚠️ Danger Zone
💡 To do a clean re-import: Click "🗑️ WIPE ALL DATA" → wait for ✅ confirmation toast → go to Vendor CRM → 📥 Bulk Import or Sales Analytics → Upload
🏪 Vendors
Delete all vendor records
🍽️ Menu Items
Delete all menu items
📋 Activities
Delete all activity logs
📁 Documents
Delete all documents
🎯 Leads
Delete all leads
📊 Sales Data
Delete all uploaded periods
🗑️ WIPE ALL DATA
Permanently deletes everything from Firebase + localStorage simultaneously.
Sync is paused during deletion so nothing comes back.

👁 Preview
📂 Folder
➕ Add File Link
⏳
Loading preview…
📁
Folder cannot be previewed
Google Drive doesn't allow folders to be embedded. Use ↗ Open in Drive to browse files, or add a direct file link below using ➕ Add File Link.
❌
Invalid Drive Link
The saved link is not a valid Google Drive URL. Use the fix button to correct it.
🔗
No Drive Link Saved
No Google Drive folder or file has been linked to this vendor yet.
📁
Google Drive Folder
ℹ️ Folders cannot be embedded in the dashboard due to Google's security policy. Click Open in Drive to view contents.
Or add a direct file link for in-app preview →
Add a Previewable File Link
Paste a direct Google Drive file link (PDF, image, Google Doc/Sheet). Files can be previewed directly in the dashboard — unlike folders.
Example: https://drive.google.com/file/d/FILE_ID/view
Saved File Links
